summary: Tested multi-step workflow feature for Aljabr Laundry Branch Management System. Fixed one critical bug in RequestTypesAdmin.js (SelectItem empty value error). All backend API tests pass (8/8). All frontend UI tests pass.

ui_bugs.component: RequestTypesAdmin.js - Assign to Team Member dropdown
ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value caused runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/request-types with workflow_steps - creates request type with 2 workflow steps
Backend: GET /api/public/request-types - includes has_workflow flag and workflow_steps_count
Backend: POST /api/dynamic-requests - creates workflow_request when request type has workflow steps
Backend: GET /api/workflow-requests - returns list of workflow requests
Backend: GET /api/workflow-requests/{id} - returns workflow request detail with workflow_steps
Backend: GET /api/workflow-stats - returns Total, Pending, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled counts
Backend: POST /api/workflow-requests/{id}/upload-step-file - completes step and moves to next
Backend: Request type without workflow steps - has_workflow=False
Frontend: Navigate to Request Types admin page (/admin/request-types) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Create new request type with workflow steps - SUCCESS (after bug fix)
Frontend: Workflow Steps builder UI shows step names and assigned to dropdowns
Frontend: New request type appears on landing page under 'Other Requests'
Frontend: Submit dynamic request from landing page - SUCCESS
Frontend: Admin dashboard Workflow Requests tab shows workflow requests with progress bars
Frontend: WorkflowRequestDetail page shows workflow steps timeline with Step 1 as current
Frontend: Workflow stats cards show Total, Pending, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLogin.js: React warning 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - setState in render (minor, not causing failures)
RequestTypesAdmin.js line 363-379: Fixed SelectItem empty value bug - changed value='' to value='unassigned' with conversion in onValueChange handler
seed_data_creation: Created 'Test Workflow Type' request type with 2 workflow steps (Design Review, Final Approval) and 1 custom field (Description). Submitted test workflow request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-step workflow feature fully tested and working. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in RequestTypesAdmin.js. All workflow features working: Request Types with workflow steps, Dynamic Requests creating workflow_requests, Workflow Requests tab with progress bars, WorkflowRequestDetail page with step timeline and file upload. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_workflow_feature.py covers all workflow API endpoints.

features_tested.create_request_type_with_workflow_steps: PASS - Manager can create request types with workflow steps via RequestTypesAdmin page
features_tested.workflow_steps_builder_ui: PASS - Dialog shows step name, assigned to dropdown, requires file toggle
features_tested.landing_page_shows_request_types: PASS - New request types appear under 'Other Requests' section
features_tested.submit_dynamic_request: PASS - Branch supervisor can submit dynamic request from landing page
features_tested.workflow_request_created: PASS - When request type has workflow steps, creates workflow_request instead of branch_request
features_tested.workflow_requests_tab: PASS - Admin dashboard shows Workflow Requests tab with progress bars and stats
features_tested.workflow_request_detail: PASS - WorkflowRequestDetail page shows step timeline with current step highlighted
features_tested.workflow_stats: PASS - Stats cards show Total, Pending, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled counts

bug_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value caused runtime error
bug_fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='unassigned' and added conversion in onValueChange handler
